title: 温跃层战斗BGM_v1_重新构思

sections.name: lock_on_intro
sections.intent: cold lock-on signal, sparse drums, establish the C# minor identity

sections.name: teleport_chase_a
sections.intent: main two-bar call and four-bar answer, combat grid enters

sections.name: pressure_rise
sections.intent: chromatic danger notes and snare pressure before the first full hook

sections.name: full_combat_hook
sections.intent: bright lead stack, four-on-floor drive, playable high-energy loop body

sections.name: stasis_break
sections.intent: short time-stop breath with lower register and threat stabs

sections.name: final_loop_return
sections.intent: return to the full hook, then cadence back toward the opening loop

anti_inertia_rules: No new reference-song extraction or similarity analysis in this pass.
The main melody is newly written from phrase cells, not copied from previous superweapon drafts.
Fast motion is delegated to drums, bass, arp, and teleport FX; the lead keeps repeatable call-and-answer phrases.
Only short pickups use sixteenth-note density; long notes are allowed to remain long.
